sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0
update TransX set amt1 = amt2, ledger = 'Z000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = 'HD62239901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = '22371_74' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = '22371_74'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt1,2), Flex1 = 'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL, len(GL)-3,4) = '9900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, '2008', GL, '' as PC, '' as CC, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, Flex4, coalesce(UWYR,'') as UWYR, '' as TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,  Flex4, coalesce(UWYR,''))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
